name: @fxyz/graph-contract
description: Graph-contract — the identity/payload contract every graph layer signs. Audience-scoped GraphRef ids, id-keyed positions, versioned tier payloads, closed honesty enums (provenance · MeasureKind · settlementState · tokenLayer), and a single per-audience serializer choke point. Zero runtime dependencies; importable by server resolvers, the graph engine, and any other rendering layer alike. Nothing above this contract may fork node identity again.
author: fxyz network
